title: Redesign Integration Sidebar with Anchored Layout and Tooltips
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the integration sidebar to have an anchored layout with clear tooltips and non-conflicting styling, so that I can easily identify and access each integration.
description:
Redesign the left sidebar for integrations:

1. **Anchored layout**: Fix the left sidebar position instead of allowing it to float
2. **Button styling**: Replace the green background with a 3px outline and `#ccc` background color to avoid conflicting with the logo colors
3. **Tooltips**: Add tooltips to each integration button explaining its purpose
acceptance_criteria: Left sidebar is anchored/fixed in position
Integration buttons use a 3px outline with #ccc background instead of green
Each integration button has a descriptive tooltip
Button styling does not conflict with the logo colors
ux_changes: Redesigned integration sidebar with anchored position, neutral #ccc background with 3px outline (replacing green), and tooltips on each button.
implementation_notes: Developer requested tooltip content for each integration option and proceeded with implementation. Tooltips were added along with the UI styling changes.
comment_summary: Developer asked for tooltip content, then implemented the full UI update including anchored sidebar, button styling, and tooltips. Deployed to development for review.
